changes: Resolved an issue wherein the potency of Holy Spirit and Holy Circle did not increase when the player had one stack of Requiescat.
Resolved an issue wherein attempting to execute the action Wanderer's Minuet multiple times in quick succession prevented players from queueing another action for execution.
Rough Divide: Increased damage and healing potency of the additional effect No Mercy has been changed from 10% to 20%.
Relentless Rush: The additional effect 'reduces damage taken by 25%' has been added.
Powerful Shot: Base potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Empyreal Arrow: Potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Drill: Potency has been increased from 9,000 to 10,000.
Drill: Potency when under the effect of Analysis has been increased from 18,000 to 20,000.
Bioblaster: Damage over time effect duration has been increased from 9 to 12 seconds.
Chain Saw: Potency has been increased from 10,000 to 12,000.
Honing Dance: The additional effect 'reduces damage taken by 20%' has been added.
Fan Dance: Potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Fire: Astral Fire II effect duration has been increased from 15 to 30 seconds.
Blizzard: Umbral Ice II effect duration has been increased from 15 to 30 seconds.
Burst: Potency has been increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Burst: Barrier potency has been increased from 12,000 to 16,000.
Paradox: Now a charged action with a maximum of 2 charges.
Night Wing: Half-asleep effect now also reduces movement speed by 50%.
Night Wing: Half-asleep effect duration has been reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Night Wing: Sleep effect duration has been reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.
Fire IV: Cast time has been reduced from 1.92 to 1.44 seconds.
Fire IV: Astral Fire III effect duration has been increased from 15 to 30 seconds.
Flare: Cast time has been reduced from 1.92 to 1.44 seconds.
Flare: Damage dealt to primary target has been increased from 8,000 to 12,000.
Blizzard IV: Cast time has been reduced from 1.92 to 1.44 seconds.
Blizzard IV: Umbral Ice III effect duration has been increased from 15 to 30 seconds.
Freeze: Cast time has been reduced from 1.92 to 1.44 seconds.
Freeze: Damage dealt to primary target has been increased from 8,000 to 12,000.
Soul Resonance: Now grants Apocatastasis, reducing damage taken by 20% with a duration of 15 seconds.
Slipstream: Potency has been increased from 6,000 to 8,000.
Slipstream: Windstorm potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Radiant Aegis: Damage reduction has been increased from 10% to 20%.
Radiant Aegis: Barrier potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Mountain Buster: Potency has been increased from 2,000 to 4,000.
Revelation: Potency has been increased from 3,000 to 6,000.
Corps-a-corps: Damage reduction has been changed from 20% to 10%.
Aspected Benefic: Base cure potency has been increased from 4,000 to 5,000.
Aspected Benefic: Maximum cure potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 10,000.

new_content.name: Data Center Travel
new_content.description: System allowing travel between data centers.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: PvP battle system with tiered matchmaking.
